subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Thy letter hath come before Our face, and thy remembrance hath been inscribed before the Throne. This is the supreme bounty wherewith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز حق کتابت تلقاء وجه حاضر و ذکرت لدی العرش مذکور اینست فضل اعظم که بان
subcodes.subjects: @nearness and remoteness, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @praise and encouragement
